title: The Official Star Wars Fact File 95
content:
{{Top|rwm|title=''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 95}} {{ReferenceMagazine |image=[[File:Fact_file_95.jpg]] |title=''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 95 |editor=[[Chris Spitale]] |contributors=*[[Andrew Darling]] *[[Matthew Harvey]] *[[Iain Lowson]] *[[James McFadden]] *[[Michael Schiavetta]] |publisher=[[De Agostini]] |release date=[[October 22]], [[2003]]{{FFdates|95}} |intl release= |pages= |issue=95 |featured= |series=''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'' }} '''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 95''' was the ninety-fifth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[October 22]], [[2003]]. {{Magazine-stub|issue}} ==Contents== *The [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]] *[[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] *[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] *[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]
How the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] adjusted to his impending fatherhood *[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] - [[Clone military education complex|Training Center]] *[[Memory droid|Memory Droid]]
Automatons used by both the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] to store data *[[:Category:Tools|Hand tools]] *''[[Chu'unthor]]'' ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from The Official Star Wars Fact File 95}} {{IncompleteApp}} {{App |characters= |organisms= |droids= |events= *[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] **[[Mission to Tatooine (Killik Twilight)|Mission to Tatooine]] |locations= |organizations= *[[Freighter tramper/Legends|Freighter tramper]] |species= |vehicles= |technology= *[[Connector rod/Legends|Connector rod]] *[[Power calibrator]] |miscellanea= }} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{FactFileNav|94|96}} {{Interlang |fi=The Official Star Wars Fact File 95 |ka=The Official Star Wars Fact File 95 }} [[Category:The Official Star Wars Fact File (2002) issues|95]]
